ESOP Acquisition Financing Partnership

Outreach
§ 01Who We Are

Forhemit Stewardship Management Co. is a California Public Benefit Corporation that guides small-business owners through ESOP transitions. We represent the seller and the ESOP trust through every stage of the transaction — from initial qualification through closing and post-close stewardship.

Our role is to assemble and manage the deal team, maintain transaction timelines, and ensure that every ESOP acquisition we support is structured to meet ERISA, SBA, and IRC requirements.

§ 02Our Deal Program

Every deal in our program is structured to be SBA 7(a)-eligible from the outset:

A.Independent FMV appraisal. Every acquisition price is supported by an independent valuation from an accredited appraiser engaged by the trustee — not the seller or Forhemit.
B.ESOP trust as buyer. The acquiring entity is a newly formed ESOP trust. The transaction qualifies under ERISA and IRC §4975(e)(7).
C.Seller note subordination. Where the deal includes a seller-financed note, it is fully subordinated to the SBA loan for the required period, with interest-only accrual during subordination.
D.Organized documentation. We provide lender-ready packages including the deal summary, capital stack, QofE analysis, and repayment model at the time of initial outreach.
§ 03Why Partner With Us

We structure our deals to make your underwriting process as efficient as possible:

A.Pre-qualified pipeline. We qualify every deal before it reaches you. You receive deals that are SBA-eligible, properly structured, and ready for underwriting.
B.Organized document flow. We maintain a gate-based document process that ensures all lender-required documents are assembled and transmitted in a structured sequence.
C.Responsive communication. We provide weekly status updates during underwriting and maintain a single point of contact for all lender communications.
D.Realistic timelines. Our standard deal timeline is 120 days from engagement to closing. We set expectations with sellers upfront and hold them accountable.
§ 04What We Need

We are looking for lending partners who can meet the following requirements:

A.SBA 7(a) lending capacity. Ability to originate and service SBA 7(a) loans in the {{loanAmountRange}} range.
B.ESOP experience preferred. Prior experience financing ESOP transactions is valued but not required. We provide deal-specific guidance on ESOP lending requirements.
C.Timeline commitment. Ability to issue a term sheet within 14 days of receiving a complete application package.
D.Trustee coordination. Willingness to work directly with the independent ESOP trustee and their counsel on deal structure and closing conditions.
§ 05Typical Deal Profile
{{ebitdaRange}}

{{downPaymentPct}}
100% ESOP acquisition (stock purchase)
90–120 days from engagement
§ 06Next Steps

If your institution is interested in partnering with Forhemit on ESOP acquisition financing, we would welcome a conversation. Please reach out to schedule an introductory call.
